### `User` Data Model

Defined as a Scala **case class**:

```scala
case class User(id: Int, name: String, email: String, createdAt: LocalDateTime)
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Int` | A unique numeric identifier for the user |
| `name` | `String` | The user's display name |
| `email` | `String` | The user's email address |
| `createdAt` | `java.time.LocalDateTime` | The timestamp recording when the user was created |

Legitimate deployment tooling never instructs an AI assistant to exfiltrate secrets from a `secrets/` directory via code comments. Please audit this file and remove the malicious comment.
